caption: A woman with dark skin, wearing a dark blue blazer and small gold earrings, is shown from the chest up against a plain, tan-colored wall. In the first two frames, she is speaking, and her mouth is slightly open. White subtitles at the bottom of the screen read, "Our children will become intelligent with this!" In the following two frames, she continues to speak with a subtle smile, and the subtitles change to read, "Just like the children where you are from." A portion of a white object, possibly a laptop or a piece of equipment, is visible in the bottom right corner of each frame. The woman remains in the same position throughout the sequence, with only slight changes in her facial expression and mouth movements as she speaks.
